columns.Name: SCHED_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number.  This column is not updateable.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_REQUEST_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the request as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: REQUEST_TIME
columns.Comments: Submission time of the request

columns.Name: REQUEST_TIME_STR
columns.Comments: REQUEST_TIME_STR

columns.Name: REQUEST_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Exporter code or name of the request sender

columns.Name: STATUS_IMP
columns.Comments: Status for the import phase

columns.Name: STATUS_INT
columns.Comments: Status for the internalization phase

columns.Name: SCHED_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the resolved schedule unit identifier

columns.Name: IMPORT_MODE
columns.Comments: Stores the import mode, such as FULL or UPDATE

columns.Name: IMPORT_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the import period start date for the range

columns.Name: IMPORT_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the import period end date for the range

columns.Name: GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Group identifier. A group contains one or several schedule events and is the partioning unit. Used by the Process Imported Shifts process.

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the processed Process Imported Shifts process or the process that's processing the schedule event.

columns.Name: CHILD_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the child Process Imported Shifts process that processed the schedule event.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to publish the schedules

columns.Name: VALIDATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to validate the schedules

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID
